description: 2^(k-p) fractional-factorial DOE matrix built from a pyDOE3 Yates generator string, returned in real units with a randomized run order.
rules: read-only — reads a JSON spec, writes a CSV; mutates no live service
seeded — the run order is reproducible from SPEC_JSON.seed
generator is Yates notation, e.g. 'a b c abc'; it must define exactly as many columns as named factors
usage: Set SPEC_JSON to a JSON file with keys: factors (required dict {name:[low,high]}), generator (required str), randomize (bool, default true), seed (int). Output: experimental_runs.csv under record_store.
limitation: Low-resolution generators confound main effects with interactions (aliasing) — know your alias structure before concluding a factor has no effect. When pyDOE3 is absent the porter writes an empty {} artifact.
